Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I do not understand what la blague was supposed to be. If you truly believe that it is hilarant to make fun of someone's origines...

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Perhaps you just parrot even less funny people, without understanding what you are doing. Should I presume your innocence ?

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: His eyes wander over the pond for a moment.

Line.Text: Oui, I will give you another chance. We shall make amends as long as you respect mes limites, as I am trying to do for you.
